subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the Goal of all worlds, Who hath manifested in that land that which distinguisheth them that have turned towards Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصود عالمیان را که در آن ارض ظاهر فرموده آنچه را که سبب امتیاز مقبلین از
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @justice and wrath of God
